libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Do not try to restore org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor or TypedProps by adding dependencies; those classes are absent from pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 and are not provided by pekko-actor-typed. Update or remove tests that target the old classic TypedActor API and focus on supported classic actor APIs such as ActorSystem, Props, Actor, serialization, ReflectiveDynamicAccess, and DNS settings. If retaining DNS default-name-server fallback coverage, preserve the existing JVM/native-image export setting --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Adding pekko-actor-typed_2.13 would test a different Pekko module and still would not provide the removed org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor API.

Pekko documentation lists pekko-testkit_2.13 as the normal test helper for classic actor tests, but it is not required to reach meaningful reachability-metadata coverage and should only be added if generated tests deliberately use TestKit/TestProbe APIs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, or mandatory environment/system property is required for meaningful org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 coverage. The observed failure is caused by tests using removed org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs, not by missing setup.
